evidence: Build v1.0.0 · fb13257 (REAL-backend preview gospel-central-ghonounep, Supabase; login shim admin/gospelseed1 — brief said mock but /api/auth/login 501 'No Supabase route' + UUID data prove real). New Contact as Dev viewer Michael: ASSIGNED TEACHER combobox offered 73 options = exact count+order of REST /api/users tags~teacher (Achaicus, Agabus, Alexander son of Simon, ...); non-teachers (Ampliatus, Andronicus) absent; typing 'matt' filtered to Matthew+Matthias; clicking Matthias set selected state (bg-primary/10 text-primary).
verdict: Teacher combobox populated, scoped to teacher-tagged users, filterable and selectable for admin/Dev — the kind:'all' sentinel regression is gone.

evidence: Kanban drag (native HTML5 DnD handlers driven with a shared DataTransfer) moved Abidan Ben-Gideoni dc7fd72d Potential→Needs Help: REST showed pipelineStage=needs_help and timeline appended {action:'stage_change', details:'Pipeline stage changed to Needs Help', userName:'Michael'}; Contact Details dialog rendered 'Jul 13, 2026 Pipeline stage changed to Needs Help by Michael'. Reverting drag Needs Help→Potential appended a SECOND row ('...changed to Potential') — append semantics, real actor, state restored (baseline timeline was 0 rows).
verdict: Stage drag writes a stage_change timeline row on the real backend (migration 0010 path) and the UI timeline renders it.

evidence: New Contact dialog, Partner 1 typed 'mat' → suggestion menu open (Joseph of Arimathea/Matthew/Matthias). Escape #1: menu closed, dialog stayed open, focus retained in the input. Escape #2: dialog closed. Counter-check: focus in plain Notes textarea → single Escape closes the dialog (native Escape not broken). Nuance: a freshly-focused PredictiveInput consumes the first Escape even before any visible menu renders (internal open-on-focus state) — consistent with the fix's menu-first contract, not a dialog-eating regression.
verdict: Escape closes the suggestion menu first and the dialog second; plain-field Escape still closes the dialog.

evidence: Abidan dc7fd72d baseline: partners [Matthias,Matthew], detail-dialog badge Matthias = text-purple-600/font-semibold, Matthew plain. Cleared Partner 1 in edit, saved → persisted [null, 1d3a56e9(Matthew), null] (slot NOT compacted). Reopened detail: Branches shows only Matthew with purple:false/semibold:false; only purple element on page = unrelated timeline dot (bg-purple-400). Edit form reopened: Partner 1 empty, Matthew still in Partner 2 (not promoted). Restoring Matthias to slot 1 brought the purple+semibold highlight back to Matthias. State fully reverted (partners now [Matthias,Matthew,null] — trailing-null 3-slot normalization is the form's canonical shape).
verdict: Main-Branch highlight strictly follows data slot 0; an emptied slot 0 highlights nobody after save+reopen, and nobody is silently promoted.

evidence: Teacherless contact (assignedTeacherId null, groupName 'Newport News Zion') rendered in Grid view: Teacher quick-field = 'Unassigned'; card text contains no church name in the Teacher slot (screenshot evidence-188-unassigned-card.png). Contact created via in-page POST /api/contacts without teacher because the documented repro path is BROKEN on the real backend: ImportCSVDialog sends createdBy:'import' → Postgres 400 22P02 'invalid input syntax for type uuid' → every CSV row fails ('1 failed'). No c-69 Rhoda on this DB (mock-only seed extension). Test contact soft-deleted after (b77988c1 inactive); active count restored to 67. Import defect flagged as separate task (task_630bc486).
verdict: The card fix holds — teacherless shows 'Unassigned', never groupName — but the CSV-import creation path itself 400s on the real backend (separate parity defect, out of this finding's scope).

evidence: Build v1.0.0 · fb13257 (REAL-backend preview gospel-central-ghonounep, Supabase — /api/auth/login 501 'No Supabase route'; state persists so all mutations reverted). Bulk-delete Barak 34771a45 via Select→checkbox→Delete→confirm: UI 67→66; REST default GET excludes him (66), includeInactive=1 shows status:'inactive' (68 total); delete wrote audit row {action:'delete',entityType:'contact',userName:'Michael'}. Adversarial refetches — edit-another-contact (Aaron Save Changes) AND hard reload — both held at 66, no resurface in DOM or REST. Admin?tab=contacts: Barak row opacity-60 (computed 0.6) + orange Inactive badge + Restore control; active control row (Aaron) undimmed/no Restore (screenshot evidence-78-151-admin-dimmed-inactive.png). Restore click → toast 'Contact restored', row flips Active/undimmed, REST 67 with Barak active, NEW audit row {action:'restore',entityType:'contact',userName:'Michael',ts:03:50:02Z} at log head. Net-zero end state. Side note: a no-op Save Changes on Aaron wrote update+update+reassign audit rows (audit noise, out of scope).
verdict: Bulk-delete soft-deletes without resurfacing on any refetch path; Admin Contacts renders the dimmed Inactive row with a working Restore that writes a real-actor restore audit row — includeInactive=1 fix (48fadc4) + restore flow (c5d3183/0015) hold on the real backend.

evidence: Build v1.0.0 · fb13257 runs the REAL Supabase backend; REST /api/contacts?includeInactive=1 (68 rows) has ZERO matches for Demas/Rhoda/Apollos/Crispus, zero convertedToUserId, zero retainUntil — the c-68..c-71 rows live only in src/mocks/scenario-church-week.ts (e9d9af9), and REMEDIATION.md itself says these checks need a NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK_API=true CLI preview. PARTIAL functional coverage with real data instead: (a) inactive dormant branch = Barak dimmed+Inactive+Restore under 78/151; (b) unassigned = teacherless temp row renders '—' in table Teacher column (card 'Unassigned' proven under 188); (c) retention-expired = PUT retainUntil 2026-01-01 on throwaway row b77988c1 → server derived retentionExpired:true on read (supabase-router.ts:23-25) and the red 'Retention expired' badge rendered in ContactsTable (screenshot evidence-seededge-retention-badge.png); reverted (retainUntil null, row re-deleted, 67/68 baseline restored). (d) Converted badge branch NOT exercised — needs a converted contact; conversion creates a user account (too invasive to revert).
verdict: As-written check is untestable on this real-backend preview (mock-only seed rows absent); 3 of 4 dormant rendering branches proven live with synthesized real data, Converted badge pending the mock preview run.

evidence: Surface: LOCAL dev mock (NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK_API=true npm run dev, localhost:3000; probes confirm mock — /api/me=u-michael, 5 blocked slots, 71 contacts). This covers the ONE dormant branch the real-backend preview could NOT (c-70 Apollos is a mock-only seed row). Admin > Contacts: Apollos of Alexandria (id c-70, contact70@diamond.org, status 'converted', convertedToUserId u-mem-88, stage baptized) renders the outline 'Converted' badge in the Status column (ContactsAdminTab.tsx:410) in BOTH the desktop TR and the mobile card (DOM row text: 'Apollos of Alexandria...Baptized...Converted...Jun 24'). Crispus of Corinth (c-71) also shows 'Converted'; Demas (c-68) shows 'Inactive'+Restore in the same table. Screenshot evidence-seededge-converted-badge.png.
verdict: The converted-status display branch (finding 62) renders live on the mock seed — the last of the 4 dormant Admin-Contacts edge rows, completing the seed-edge-cases check the real-backend preview left Blocked.

evidence: Surface: LOCAL dev mock (localhost:3000, NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK_API=true) — the VB full-day closure (bs-vb-convention-day, area-virginia-beach, start 2026-07-22T04:00Z, reason 'Building closed - regional convention') is a mock-only seed row absent from the real-backend preview. Booking wizard > When step: date set to Wed 2026-07-22, activity Event/Committee, range 10:00-11:00am -> Next -> Room step (Step 2 of 4, header 'Unavailable rooms on Jul 22 are greyed out'). All 6 Virginia Beach rooms (VB Study Room 1/2/3, VB Conference Room, ODU Library, Living Room) are DISABLED with disabledReason 'No availability this day' (BookingWizard.tsx:319, free===0 from the area closure); all 7 Newport News bookable rooms show '32 free 30-min slots'. DOM-confirmed on all 6 VB rooms + screenshot evidence-236-vb-no-availability.png.
verdict: Finding 236's 'No availability this day' disabled-room reason is reachable with seed data (the e9d9af9 VB closure) — the batch-221-240 audit's earlier 'unreachable data condition' is resolved.

evidence: Build v1.0.0 · fb13257 (REAL Supabase backend preview gospel-central-ghonounep — /api/rooms 501 'No Supabase route', UUID data, login shim admin/gospelseed1). Booking wizard > When step, native date input (Year spinbutton valuemax 275760). Typed 6-digit '202026' then 5-digit '20202' digit-by-digit into the Year segment via keyboard; both transient values ('202026-07-14','20202-07-14') are JS-unparseable (in-page new Date(v+'T00:00') = NaN), exactly what the onChange guard `if(isNaN(next.getTime()))return` (WhenStep.tsx:185) rejects. Wizard stayed mounted across every keystroke (dialog 'New Booking Step 1', date coerced to valid 0006-07-14 / 0002-07-14), NO error boundary / 'Invalid time value', zero console errors.
verdict: 6-digit (and 5-digit) year entry never crashes the wizard; the NaN-date guard holds and the dialog survives.

evidence: DayView elapsed logic (DayView.tsx:138 slotEnd<=clockNow): with client clock pinned mid-afternoon (?__mockDate=2026-07-14T15:30:00-04:00) 15 fully-elapsed slots/room are disabled+dimmed (opacity-50, title 'This time has passed'), first bookable = 3:30pm; on real-clock yesterday (Jul 13) ALL 288 slots disabled+dimmed; on today at real 00:57 zero dimmed (nothing elapsed yet) — boundary exact. Wizard When step: selecting the past 8:00am slot renders amber role=status notice 'This time is in the past — you're recording a study that already happened' (text-amber-600/dark:amber-500); after setting mode+baptism the Next button becomes ENABLED with the past slot still selected and notice still shown.
verdict: Fully-elapsed Day slots are dimmed+disabled; the wizard past-selection shows the amber notice but does not block progression/save.

evidence: Created a real study booking via the wizard (leader Paul → contact Elishama Ben-Ammihud unbaptized → subject 'Secret of the Forgiveness of Sins & Christ Ahnsahnghong'); POST persisted title = 'Bible Study: Paul with Elishama Ben-Ammihud — Secret of the Forgiveness of Sins & Christ Ahnsahnghong' (ends '— {subject}', BookingWizard.tsx:489), booking count 105→106. EDIT test: changed leader Paul→Timothy + saved with reason; REST re-read title = 'Bible Study: Timothy with Elishama Ben-Ammihud — Secret of the Forgiveness of Sins & Christ Ahnsahnghong' — suffix PRESERVED (title.endsWith('— '+subject)=true), teacherId updated. REVERT: hard DELETE /bookings/{id} returns 501 (unimplemented on real backend) so cancelled via POST /bookings/{id}/cancel (200, status→'cancelled'); residual = one cancelled booking 6c6c070f (max revert available, renders as greyed 'Cancelled' card).
verdict: New study booking title ends '— {subject}' and edits rebuild the same shape instead of stripping the subject.

evidence: Wizard Subject step (StepSubjectPicker). Foundation section active: clicked 'Select all in Foundation' → all 12 subjects selected and the toggle flipped to 'Deselect all in Foundation' (section name preserved, NOT bare 'Deselect all'). Switched to Growth tab → toggle read 'Select all in Growth'; clicked it → 'Deselect all in Growth'. Confirms the {CURRICULUM_SECTION_CONFIG[activeSection].label} suffix is dynamic per section (StepSubjectPicker.tsx:169/174).
verdict: The Select/Deselect-all-in-section toggle always carries the active section-name suffix in both directions and both sections.

evidence: Calendar 'Show page help' dialog full innerText scanned in-page: regex /\d+\s+rooms?/ = null (no '8 rooms' or any numeric room count). Copy instead reads 'MRBS-style booking grid showing every room across the current week, day, or month' and 'every room stacked side-by-side within each day' (calendarHelp, pageHelp.ts:40/45).
verdict: The Calendar help dialog contains no hardcoded room count; it uses 'every room' phrasing.

evidence: On this REAL Supabase backend the Virginia Beach full-day next-Wednesday closure blocked slot does NOT exist: REST /api/blocked-slots (global) and ?areaId=916c0884 (Virginia Beach Zion) both return ONLY the 4 recurring service windows (Tue 20:00, Sabbath 09:00/15:00/20:00, all areaId=null) — zero date-specific/full-day closures. Without that mock-only seed row the 'No availability this day' greyed-room branch cannot be exercised here. Mock-only seed row missing = the VB full-day convention closure; the mock-local counterpart is already Fixed-verified (this JSONL line 9, NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK_API=true local run).
verdict: Untestable on the real-backend preview — the VB full-day closure is a mock-only seed row absent from the real DB; covered separately by the mock-local run.

evidence: Build v1.0.0 · fb13257 (REAL Supabase backend — UUID ids, /api/audit-log total 308). Reports dashboard 'This Month' card = 308; setting the table date filter to the 'This Month' preset gave pagination 'Showing 1–15 of 308' — identical number. REST cross-check: client-side month-bounded count (startOfMonth→now) = 308 == server-side startDate/endDate query total = 308; future-stamped rows = 0. After an unrelated cancel, card and table total both moved together to 309. Code carries the through-now (t<=nowMs) bound on BOTH thisMonthCount and the card's drill-down entries. Adversarial caveat: the real DB has zero future-stamped rows, so the mock's 51-vs-47 over-count path cannot be exercised here — but card==table exactly, the finding's expectation.
verdict: 'This Month' card equals the table 'This Month' preset count (308==308; 309==309 after mutation); through-now bound present on both surfaces.

evidence: Cancelled booking 881721ff (Abel — 'King David & Christ Ahnsahnghong') through the real BookingWizard Confirm→Cancel Booking→typed-reason flow, reason='QA reverify 497/516 — restore after test'. Admin > Audit Log detail dialog rendered a REASON row with that verbatim text, ACTOR 'Michael' (real user from the session JWT, not a mock actorId), plus BEFORE(status bible_study, cancelReason null)/AFTER(status cancelled) JSON snapshots. REST audit row id 45497f57 carried reason + userName 'Michael ', entityId=881721ff. Booking then RESTORED (POST /bookings/:id/restore → 200, status back to bible_study, cancelReason null) so the entity is net-unchanged; cancel+restore audit rows are append-only by design.
verdict: Typed cancel reason persists to the audit row on the real backend (migration 0013) and renders as a Reason row with the real actor; wizard closes atomically (264 morph is the refuted-as-designed Radix exit flash).

evidence: Reports stat drill-down dialog Export button, anchor download filename intercepted: Cancellations card → 'gospel-central-cancellations.csv'; This Month card → 'gospel-central-this-month.csv'. Both start with gospel-central-, no diamond- prefix. Source builds `gospel-central-${label-slug}.csv` in the stat dialog onClick.
verdict: Stat-dialog CSV export filename starts gospel-central- (the diamond- prefix is gone) across multiple cards.

evidence: Baseline Reports Cancellations card = 2 (REST action='cancel' count = 2). After cancelling booking 881721ff with a typed reason, the Cancellations card = 3 and REST cancel count = 3 (+1); the Creates card stayed at 6 while Total/This Month moved 308→309 — proving the card counts action='cancel' only, not delete/restore/other. Reverted via restore (booking back to bible_study; the cancel audit row persists append-only).
verdict: Cancellations card counts the newly-created cancel (2→3), scoped strictly to action='cancel' by design.

evidence: Build v1.0.0 · fb13257 (REAL Supabase backend preview gospel-central-ghonounep; fix commit 19c075f confirmed git ancestor of fb13257). Groups /groups TreeSearchBar: typed "team leader" -> dropdown rendered EXACTLY 10 result rows (Barnabas, Silas, Matthias, Paul, Jude son of James, Simon the Zealot, Timothy, Titus, John Mark, Luke - all role team_leader) followed by a footer listitem (aria-live=polite) reading "+8 more matches — keep typing to narrow". REST cross-check /api/groups/tree (200, 132 nodes): replicating buildSearchIndex, 18 entries whose haystack contains "team leader" (all role=team_leader); 18-10=8 exactly matches the footer. Adversarial negative test: "Barnabas" -> 7 matches (<=10) shows NO footer, proving searchEntriesWithTotal total>results.length gate is conditional not hardcoded.
verdict: The "+N more matches" overflow hint renders correctly (10 rows + "+8 more matches") for a broad role search and is suppressed when results fit within the 10-cap; the silent-truncation bug (finding 349) is fixed on the real-backend preview.

evidence: Build v1.0.0 · fb13257, REAL Supabase backend preview (gospel-central-ghonounep). Logged in branch1/gospelseed1 = Joseph (role branch_leader, id c609231c). Real DB has 2 BLs: Joseph (Newport News) + Simon Peter (Virginia Beach); Joseph manageable subtree = 74 descendants + self = 75. UI: opened own-branch contact Abel (id e263f17a, Newport News Zion, current teacher Manaen) -> Edit -> ASSIGNED TEACHER combobox rendered 75 options; cross-checked EVERY rendered label against the org roster by id -> 0 cross-branch (Virginia Beach) options, 0 unknown names, count 75 == manageable subtree exactly. Known VB teachers (Apollos, Aquila, Bartholomew, John the Baptist, etc.) all absent. REST write-path probe (same-origin fetch, httpOnly cookie): PUT /api/contacts/e263f17a {assignedTeacherId: 039cd5b5 = Apollos, VB team_leader} -> DENIED (body {message:PERMISSION_DENIED, details.code P0001}); assigned_teacher_id identical before/after (70a42ab1 Manaen), no mutation, no audit row (txn rollback). STATUS NUANCE: response was HTTP 400 not the literal 403 in the expectation -- 0014 raises a bare PERMISSION_DENIED with no TOKEN:message colon, so supabase.ts pgErrorToApiError token-map misses and falls through to 400/UNKNOWN; this bare-raise pattern is pre-existing and app-wide (many 0002-0005 RPCs raise the same way), not a regression from 0014 and not a security gap. Reverted: edit form cancelled with no field changes; the only write attempted was the cross-branch PUT, which the server rejected, so the DB is net-unchanged (final read confirms teacher still Manaen).
verdict: BL cross-branch reassign is blocked on BOTH surfaces: the ContactDetail edit dropdown is scoped to the own branch (75 options, 0 Virginia Beach) and the write path denies a cross-branch assignedTeacherId with zero mutation. Migration 0014 own-branch gate verified enforcing. Caveat: denial surfaces as HTTP 400 (PERMISSION_DENIED body) rather than 403 due to a pre-existing bare-raise token-mapping quirk shared across many RPCs -- security outcome is correct.
